title: Zesty Holiday Dip
description: Bright, sharp, and clean. This dip cuts through heavy holiday food with lemon, mustard, and parmesan bringing the punch. Light but not boring.
instructions: Strain yogurt for 20 minutes using a strainer or colander over a bowl to remove excess liquid.
In a medium bowl, combine strained yogurt, Parmesan cheese, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, olive oil, and chopped garlic.
Mix well until smooth and fully combined.
Season with salt and cracked black pepper to taste.
notes: Straining the yogurt makes the dip thicker and more spreadable.
Use Greek yogurt if you want to skip the straining step.
Let it sit for 10 minutes before serving to let flavors develop.
whyThisHits: It brings acid, fat, and salt into perfect balance. Light enough to not weigh you down, but still delivers real flavor.
pairing: Serve with carrots, celery, cucumbers, or crackers. Also works as a spread on sandwiches or wraps.
footerLine: Art for Your Mouth. Because boring food is a waste of time.
